summary: Full testing of Appointments Module (WellTrack). All 14 features tested. Backend APIs and frontend UI all passing.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend appointments.py is well-structured with proper auth checks (admin bypass + appointment_access flag)
No _id leakage — _clean() properly removes MongoDB _id from all responses
Frontend AppointmentsPage.jsx (675 lines) is at the limit — consider splitting SessionModal into its own file for maintainability
Note: /api/role-permissions endpoint does not exist — role permissions are stored in /api/settings under role_permissions key. This is fine as the frontend uses /api/settings correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted one test appointment (apt_d873c3c8) during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Appointments module fully working. All 14 features from the review_request pass. Backend: schedule/ongoing/completed/create/delete/audit endpoints all 200. Professional settings PUT /api/users/{id}/professional working. Frontend: Appointments nav item visible, 3 tabs (Schedule/Ongoing/Completed), week view Mon-Fri calendar with + per day, confidentiality toggle (Eye icon → 'Names hidden'), New Session modal with all fields (student search, intervention type, date/time, notes, Save/Cancel), Save disabled when no student/intervention, gear icon per user row opens Professional Settings modal (Appointment Access toggle, Professional Type, Visit Days checkboxes, Cross-Professional View), Role Permissions tab shows Appointments row, Dashboard loads without errors.

results.schedule_week_view: PASS - Mon-Fri columns with + button per day
results.session_modal_fields: PASS - student search, intervention type, date/time, notes, Save/Cancel
results.save_disabled_when_empty: PASS - disabled when no student or intervention type
results.ongoing_tab: PASS - loads with empty state message
results.completed_tab: PASS - loads with empty state message
results.role_permissions_appointments_row: PASS - visible in Page Access table
